title: isoloma incanum
intro: Isoloma incanum, also known as the 'Mountain Pepper', is a shrub native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in Fiji, Samoa, and Tonga. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Isoloma incanum include its ability to reduce pain, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tincture, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
